Repeatable to: 6 credits.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

580 COMM - Communication

COMM619 Consecutive Interpretation (1-6 Credits)

Builds upon the systematic, reflective approach to interpreting in real- world settings introduced in Fundamentals of Interpreting. Consecutive interpreting skills are consolidated through individual and group practice, and any remaining challenges related to consecutive interpreting sub- skills are identified and addressed. Stresses effective analysis, note- taking, and use of voice during exercises in sight translation, dialogue, and formal consecutive interpreting.

Prerequisite: COMM609; and must have completed an admissions
